channel.title: KrakenD, S.L. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by KrakenD, S.L. (krakend).

item.title: CVE-2026-3206 · 1.3 LOW — Improper management of context cancelations
item.description: Improper Resource Shutdown or Release vulnerability in KrakenD, SLU KrakenD-CE (CircuitBreaker modules), KrakenD, SLU KrakenD-EE (CircuitBreaker modules). This issue affects KrakenD-CE: before 2.13.1; KrakenD-EE: before 2.12.5.
